headline: Delta (DAL) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of global airline Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) jumped 8.2% in the afternoon session after a regulatory filing revealed that Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway built a stake worth more than $2.6 billion in the airline.
